DROP ROW POLICY IF EXISTS test_row_policy;
DROP SETTINGS PROFILE IF EXISTS test_settings_profile;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nested_table1 WHERE name IN (SELECT name FROM nested_table2);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table) WHERE id < 10;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM another_table) AS subquery) WHERE condition = true;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS complex_table1 JOIN complex_table2 ON complex_table1.id = complex_table2.id;
DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS (SELECT database_name FROM system.databases WHERE database_name LIKE 'test_%');
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS (SELECT view_name FROM system.views WHERE materialized = 0);
